arts.ttl: Juventus announce squad for Manchester City clash: Cambiaso uut, two players return
arts.sum: Juventus manager Thiago Motta has released the list of players called up for tonight’s match against Manchester City, which marks the sixth matchday of the Champions League League Phase. Andrea Cambiaso has not recovered from the injury he sustained on Saturday against Bologna. The medical bulletin stated: “Andrea Cambiaso, who left the field during the first half of Saturday night’s match against Bologna, underwent instrumental tests this morning at J | medical. The tests revealed a modest capsular ligament strain of his left ankle.
